api: Statsig Console API v1 (https://statsigapi.net/console/v1), API version 20240601
scope: Pass B full-surface expansion: full documented Console API v1 surface (302 method+path endpoints across gates, dynamic configs, experiments, segments, target apps, tags, keys, holdouts, layers, users, audit logs, environments, and 20+ specialized subsystems) reviewed against the real OpenAPI 20240601 spec; 12 GET list/detail resources implemented as streams, 17 CRUD mutations implemented as writes.json actions, remainder excluded with per-endpoint closed-vocabulary categories (see docs.md Known limits for the exclusion-family summary)
